title: Illuminating Midnight Craving Fatty Pork Binchotan-Grilled
description: A midnight-craving Filipino dish featuring crispy fatty pork grilled on a Bincho-tan grill with garlic granules for a unique flavor profile.
instructions: Preheat Bincho-tan grill to medium-high heat.
Season pork belly with salt and garlic powder. Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate for 30 minutes.
Combine sesame oil, soy sauce, minced garlic, and fatty pork cracklings in a small bowl. Mix well until evenly combined.
Brush the marination mixture onto the seasoned pork belly on all sides.
Place the pork belly on the preheated Bincho-tan grill skin side down. Cook for 10 minutes or until golden brown.
Gently flip and cook the other side for an additional 8-10 minutes, until cooked through.
Drizzle with a bit more sesame oil mixture to finish cooking and enhance flavor.
Remove from heat and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
